name: Men's Haircut
description: A tailored gentleman's cut — classic, modern, or textured — finished with a wash and clean styling.

name: Skin Fade
description: Precision fade blended down to the skin for a sharp, modern look.

name: Kids Cut (Under 12)
description: A patient, friendly cut for the little ones, styled just how they like it.

name: Beard Trim & Shape
description: Detailed beard line-up and shaping with hot towel and beard oil finish.

name: Hot Towel Traditional Shave
description: A smooth, traditional straight-razor shave with hot towels and aftershave balm.

name: Haircut & Beard Combo
description: A full men's haircut paired with a beard trim and shape.

name: Women's Cut & Style
description: A personalized women's cut with a wash, blow-dry, and finish — from chic bobs to long layers.

name: Blowout & Styling
description: A polished blow-dry and style — glamorous waves, sleek and straight, or soft curls.

name: Updo / Special Occasion
description: Elegant updos and event styling for weddings, parties, and special days.

name: Braids
description: Playful and protective braided styles, tailored to your hair and look.

name: Color / Highlights
description: Single-process color, highlights, or balayage using premium products. Consultation included.
